name: Swedish Oven Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs well in a large bowl.
2. Add milk, melted butter, salt, and flour to the egg mixture. Mix until smooth.
3. Grease a 9 x 13 inch baking pan with additional butter or oil.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
5. Bake at 425°F (220°C) for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown and set.
6. Cut the cooked pancakes into squares and serve immediately with butter and syrup.
Variations:
1. Omit the butter from the recipe before baking.
2. Cook 3 strips of bacon in a pan until crisp, then crumble the bacon and add it to the bottom of the greased pan along with the drippings.
3. Pour the batter over the cooked bacon and bake at 375°F (190°C) for 30 minutes.
4. For a berry and cream topping, mix half a pint (about 120 ml) of whipped cream with a jar of preserves (such as raspberry, strawberry, or apricot).
5. Serve with sour cream mixed into the cream for added flavor.
